config.adaptivemobai.option.loadout.empt: learned: use the mod's learned weapon pool
config.adaptivemobai.option.loadout.defa: default: keep the mob's existing weapon
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.root.mob_ai: Open per-mob settings for vanilla mobs. Pick a mob, then adjust AI and loadout behavior.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.root.advanc: Open settings for modded mobs. Review auto-assigned tactic profiles and per-mob overrides here.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.root.disabl: Set every mob loadout to default so mobs keep their vanilla equipment. This updates the loadout config and reloads it immediately.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.common.back: Return to the previous config page.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.common.save: Save the current edits to disk.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.common.canc: Close this screen without saving the current edits.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.advanced.au: When enabled, modded mobs without a manual tactic override are matched to a likely tactic profile automatically.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.single.load: Open the weapon loadout editor. Learned uses the mod's learned weapon pool, default keeps the mob's existing weapon, and none forces it to spawn unarmed.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.single.enha: Toggle this mob between Adaptive Mob AI behavior and vanilla AI.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.single.tact: Set a tactic profile override for this mob, or leave it on default/auto so the mod chooses for you.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.single.clea: Remove the manual tactic profile override and return to default/automatic profile selection.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.loadouts.we: Choose weapon slot %s. Learned uses the mod's learned weapon pool, default preserves the mob's existing weapon, and none forces an unarmed spawn.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.loadouts.de: Choose the default arrow item given to bow or crossbow mobs when no per-mob arrow override exists.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.loadouts.mo: Set a bow or crossbow ammo override for the selected mob only. Default uses the global arrow setting.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.loadouts.sa: Write the current loadout settings to adaptivemobai-common.toml and reload them immediately.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.loadouts.ca: Close the loadout editor without saving the current edits.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.per_mob.ove: Enable or disable the per-mob AI override system.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.per_mob.sho: Toggle whether vanilla entity ids are shown in the list alongside modded ones.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.per_mob.set: Force the selected mob to keep vanilla AI. Adaptive Mob AI will not inject its combat goals.
Force the selected mob to use Adaptive Mob AI behavior.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.per_mob.cle: Remove the selected mob's AI override and fall back to the default Enhanced setting.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.modded.mapp: Enable or disable tactic-profile mapping for modded mobs.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.modded.auto: When enabled, modded mobs without a manual override are matched to a likely tactic profile automatically.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.modded.show: Toggle whether vanilla entity ids are shown in the list alongside modded ones.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.modded.set_: Assign a specific tactic profile to the selected entity.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.modded.clea: Remove the selected entity's tactic override and return to automatic or default behavior.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.modded.defa: Choose the fallback tactic profile for hostile modded mobs when no closer match is available.
Choose the fallback tactic profile for passive modded mobs when no closer match is available.
